meaning: n.轻松, 自在; v.缓解, 减轻; phr. at ease with 与……相处自在
example: He feels at ease with nature when hiking alone.

meaning: n.碗; v.快速移动; adv./prep.（向某处）迅速移动
example: Soon we were bowling along the country roads.

meaning: v.吃; phr.v. eat up 吞噬, 耗尽
example: The flames ate up the forest.

meaning: adj.完全相同的, 极其相似的（常与 to / with 连用）
example: The picture looked identical to my dog.

meaning: n.赤道
example: Countries near the equator have a warm climate.

meaning: n.闪光, 突现的念头; v.闪现
example: She solved the problem in a flash of inspiration.

meaning: n.[U]能力, 才智; n.[C]特殊技能
example: He has a natural ability for music.

meaning: n.熟人; n.对某事的了解
example: I have some acquaintance with this topic.

meaning: n.精通, 掌握; n.控制
example: Practice leads to mastery of a language.

meaning: adj.连贯的, 条理清楚的; adj.一致的
example: She gave a coherent explanation.

meaning: v.评估, 评价; v.判断
example: Teachers assess students’ progress regularly.

meaning: v.巩固; v.合并, 加强
example: Revision helps consolidate what we have learned.

meaning: v.逐渐增加; v.攀登; n.山
example: Pressure continued to mount.

meaning: adj.可靠的, 值得信赖的
example: She is a dependable partner.

meaning: v.补偿; v.弥补
example: Exercise can compensate for stress.

meaning: v.违反; v.侵犯
example: They violated the school rules.

meaning: v.辞职; v.顺从, 接受（较正式）
example: He resigned from his position.

meaning: adj.亲密的, 私人的; v.暗示
example: They shared an intimate conversation.

meaning: adj.僵硬的; adj.严格的
example: A rigid system limits creativity.

meaning: v.实现; v.履行
example: She fulfilled her dream through hard work.

meaning: adj.模糊的, 不明确的
example: He gave a vague answer.
